总的来说看这个本书不会吃亏的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773508840,"group_id":"7600305302205893657","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+9U9N1p5nhkUJIxWAvGHRw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"512841053643831","user_name":"摩尔之"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"512841053643831","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7600305302205893657","book_info":{"abstract":"(评分刚出，会涨的）
【战争游戏】【学院】【文明】【卡牌】【帝国时代】【国运争霸】【即时战略】
《战争游戏》开启，文明成为卡牌，历史化为兵锋。
每一座兵营、每一匹战马、每一个指挥官，
都会决定一个文明的兴衰。
有人追求单一最强兵种，
有人迷信无脑数值碾压。
而钟逸，选择了一条最难、也最危险的路——
解锁整个华夏战争体系。
汉军反胡骑，唐军破敌阵，宋军固守不败，元骑踏碎诸国，明军炮火轰鸣。
当全世界意识到不对劲时，
战场上只剩下一句话：
“别和他打正面——那是华夏阵营。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c1d90a12ed3ca69986dc6cc65f368670","author":"机佐","author_id":"","book_id":"7600305302205893657","book_name":"战争游戏，我解锁了整个华夏文明","book_short_name":"历史代理人","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":874,"name":"卡牌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=874&name=卡牌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7600305390785413657","read_count":"93983","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"228507"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"111","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,国运,争霸,卡牌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/de5e48a211606146109fb6c0329ff12f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779162983&x-signature=3i01svlWBnBi3wQx98bwHt1SBnM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2147785666463786","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"133"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032011562369ECE62F829CAC09C93D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_ en_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":19,"show_pv":8988},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614180437424243480","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"先说重要的信息，皇后非钟贞莫属！我选钟贞，她才是天命所归！
以下是正文：
确实很好，历史底蕴深厚，战略谋划合理，剧情存在新意，确实算得上是一本佳作。
关于主角的伴侣方面，我认为作为天子，妃嫔可以有很多，但皇后只能有一个，而钟贞，不但门当户对，还只对主角态度不同，这不就是皇后的不二之选吗？
且她存在神秘背景，可以与主角齐头并进，更是一大优势，我为钟贞扛大旗，我选钟贞！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772819182,"group_id":"7600305302205893657","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"慕光扑火宁舍命，晴日无见半只影","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N17F7EMqL6R1S4L+ylPBjORLxYZP6zsaF+EFWAGwhQco","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9b355133fa6640288b257e68a46dab68~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536448&x-signature=HAxtWDuNNZEsG0w5yRm3MgC4ayg%3D","user_id":"2509539013565226","user_name":"竹高千仞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2509539013565226","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7600305302205893657","book_info":{"abstract":"(评分刚出，会涨的）
